---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

## Package installation

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)

```

## Read .csv files
```{r}
subfolder_list <- list.dirs(path =Path_1, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
Actin_list  <- subfolder_list [ grepl("LA", subfolder_list) ]
Arp3_list  <- subfolder_list [ grepl("Arp3", subfolder_list) ]
Myl_list  <- subfolder_list [ grepl("Myl", subfolder_list) ]

list.files(Myl_list[1],pattern = "Myl(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

list.files(Myl_list[1],pattern = "Myl(.*)tif$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = F)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file

```

```{r}
Myl_quant$Series<- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")

Myl_quant$roi <- rep(1:13, each=3)

Myl_quant$Mean <- Myl_quant$Mean - 10000
```

```{r}
Myl_quant_wide<- pivot_wider(Myl_quant, id_cols = "roi", names_from = "Series", values_from = "Mean")

Myl_quant_wide$mean<- rowMeans(Myl_quant_wide[,c(2:4)])

Myl_quant_wide$Pre <- Myl_quant_wide$Pre-Myl_quant_wide$mean
Myl_quant_wide$Act <- Myl_quant_wide$Act-Myl_quant_wide$mean
Myl_quant_wide$Post <- Myl_quant_wide$Post-Myl_quant_wide$mean

Myl_quant_long<- pivot_longer(Myl_quant_wide[-5,], cols=c(2:4), names_to = "Series", values_to="Int")

Myl_quant_long$Series <- factor(Myl_quant_long$Series, levels=unique(Myl_quant_long$Series))

```

```{r}
library(ggpubr)

my_comparisons <- list( c("Pre", "Act"), c("Act", "Post"), c("Pre", "Post") )

ggplot(Myl_quant_long, aes(x=Series, y=Int, fill=Series)) + 
  geom_violin(trim=FALSE, 
              kernel ="gaussian", 
              adjust=1.6)+
  #geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white")  +
  geom_point(aes(fill=Series,group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2))+
  geom_line(aes(group=roi), position = position_dodge(0.2)) +
  stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=T, method="wilcox.test")+
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-40, 60), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "Myl.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r}
Actin_quant$Series<- c("Pre", "Act", "Post")

Actin_quant$roi <- rep(1:13, each=3)

Actin_quant$Mean <- Actin_quant$Mean - 10000
```

```{r}
Actin_quant_wide<- pivot_wider(Actin_quant, id_cols = "roi", names_from = "Series", values_from = "Mean")

Actin_quant_wide$mean<- rowMeans(Actin_quant_wide[,c(2:4)])

Actin_quant_wide$Pre <- Actin_quant_wide$Pre-Actin_quant_wide$mean
Actin_quant_wide$Act <- Actin_quant_wide$Act-Actin_quant_wide$mean
Actin_quant_wide$Post <- Actin_quant_wide$Post-Actin_quant_wide$mean

Actin_quant_long<- pivot_longer(Actin_quant_wide[-c(5,8), ], cols=c(2:4), names_to = "Series", values_to="Int")

Actin_quant_long$Series <- factor(Actin_quant_long$Series, levels=unique(Actin_quant_long$Series))

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Actin.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```
# Myl intensity
```{r}

selected_list  <- Myl_list #[ !grepl("200916", Kymo_list) ]

freq <- 1 # set frequency (1/interval)

Myl_df_list<- list()

# read csv files in the subfolders of subfolder list
for (n in 1:length(selected_list))  
{
  
  df <- list.files(selected_list[n],pattern = "Myl(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  
                     include.dirs = F, 
                     full.name = TRUE)  %>% read.csv(header = TRUE)
  
 # df <-  mapply(`*`,df, 1/100)
  
  tif_list <- list.files(selected_list[n], pattern = "Myl(.*)tif$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = F)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
  
  tif_list <- gsub("-", ".", tif_list)
  
  df_list<- list()
  
  for (m in 1:length(tif_list))  
     {
    
      df1 <- df[, grep(tif_list[m],  colnames(df)), drop = FALSE] %>% as.data.table()
      
      colnames(df1)<-c(paste("roi_", 1:(ncol(df1)-1), sep = ""), "soma")
      
      df_list[[m]] <- df1
      
  }
  
  names(df_list)<- tif_list

  Myl_df_list[[n]]<- df_list
 
}

NM <- gsub("G:/LSM980/PA_Rac1/Analyzed/", "", selected_list)
names(Myl_df_list) <- gsub("/Myl_LA", "", NM)

Myl_df_list <- unlist(Myl_df_list, recursive=FALSE)

```

# Arp3 intensity
```{r}

selected_list  <- Arp3_list #[ !grepl("200916", Kymo_list) ]

freq <- 1 # set frequency (1/interval)

Arp3_df_list<- list()

# read csv files in the subfolders of subfolder list
for (n in 1:length(selected_list))  
{
  
  df <- list.files(selected_list[n],pattern = "Arp3(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  
                     include.dirs = F, 
                     full.name = TRUE)  %>% read.csv(header = TRUE)
  
 # df <-  mapply(`*`,df, 1/100)
  
  tif_list <- list.files(selected_list[n],pattern = "Arp3(.*)tif$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = F)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
  
  tif_list <- gsub("-", ".", tif_list)
  
  df_list<- list()
  
  for (m in 1:length(tif_list))  
     {
    
      df1 <- df[, grep(tif_list[m],  colnames(df)), drop = FALSE] %>% as.data.table()
      
      colnames(df1)<-c(paste("roi_", 1:(ncol(df1)-1), sep = ""), "soma")
      
      df_list[[m]] <- df1
      
  }
  
  names(df_list)<- tif_list

  Arp3_df_list[[n]]<- df_list
 
}

NM <- gsub("G:/LSM980/PA_Rac1/Analyzed/", "", selected_list)
names(Arp3_df_list) <- gsub("/Arp3_LA", "", NM)

Arp3_df_list <- unlist(Arp3_df_list, recursive=FALSE)

```

# Actin intensity
```{r}

selected_list  <- Actin_list #[ !grepl("200916", Kymo_list) ]

freq <- 1 # set frequency (1/interval)

Actin_df_list<- list()

# read csv files in the subfolders of subfolder list
for (n in 1:length(selected_list))  
{
  
  df <- list.files(selected_list[n],pattern = "Actin(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  
                     include.dirs = F, 
                     full.name = TRUE)  %>% read.csv(header = TRUE)
  
 # df <-  mapply(`*`,df, 1/100)
  
  tif_list <- list.files(selected_list[n],pattern = "LA(.*)tif$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = F)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
  
  tif_list <- gsub("-", ".", tif_list)
  
  df_list<- list()
  
  for (m in 1:length(tif_list))  
     {
    
      df1 <- df[, grep(tif_list[m],  colnames(df)), drop = FALSE] %>% as.data.table()
      
      colnames(df1)<-c(paste("roi_", 1:(ncol(df1)-1), sep = ""), "soma")
      
      df_list[[m]] <- df1
      
  }
  
  names(df_list)<- tif_list

  Actin_df_list[[n]]<- df_list
 
}

NM <- gsub("G:/LSM980/PA_Rac1/Analyzed/", "", selected_list)
NM  <- gsub("/Myl_LA", "", NM)
NM  <- gsub("/Arp3_LA", "", NM)
names(Actin_df_list) <-  gsub("/LA", "", NM)

Actin_df_list <- unlist(Actin_df_list, recursive=FALSE)

```

```{r}
all_list <- list(Actin = Actin_df_list, 
                 Arp3 = Arp3_df_list,  
                 Myl = Myl_df_list)
```

# Create stationary (differential) curve of all measurements
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
all_sta_list <- list()
all_mts_list <- list()

freq <- 1 # set frequency (1/interval). 0.2 for _Arp3SNAPSiR_07, 0.5 for _Arp3SNAPSiR_01

for (m in 1:length(all_list)) {
  
  selected_list <- all_list[[m]]
  #selected_list <- selected_list[ grepl("Arp3SNAPSiR", names(selected_list) )]
  sta_list <- list()
  mts_list <- list()

  for (n in 1:length(selected_list))  {
 
    df <- selected_list[[n]]
    
    df1 <- df %>% 
    forecast::ma(3) %>%                                    # smoothing #1
    MTS::diffM(d=1) %>% 
    forecast::ma(5) %>% 
    ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) %>% imputeTS::na_kalman()
  
   #df1 <-pracma::hampel(df1, k=3)$y # remove jumping spikes
  
    colnames(df1)<-colnames(df)
    
    sta_list[[n]] <- df1 
    
    df2 <- df %>% forecast::ma(5) %>% imputeTS::na_kalman()
    colnames(df2)<-colnames(df)
    
    mts_list[[n]] <- df2 
  
  }

names(sta_list)<-  names(selected_list)
names(mts_list)<-  names(selected_list)
  
all_sta_list[[m]]<- sta_list
all_mts_list[[m]]<- mts_list
  
}

names(all_sta_list)<- names(all_list )
names(all_mts_list)<- names(all_list )
```

```{r}
all_sta_list$Actin$`210115.PARac1mVenus_Arp3SNAP_LAmScar.02.3.tif` %>%  na.spline(na.rm = F)

all_sta_list$Actin$`210115.PARac1mVenus_Arp3SNAP_LAmScar.02.3.tif` %>% imputeTS::na_kalman()

```

# check the curve of created stationary data
```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
selected_list <- all_mts_list$Actin$`210205_good.KO_PARac1mVenus_LASNAP_Myl12amScar.01.1415.tif`

 selected_list %>%  autoplot() +
  geom_line(aes(),size=0.25)  +
 scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(10000, 10050), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),  limits = c(0, 160), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) + 
   theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) + 
   theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold"),
        legend.position = "none")  #for centering the text
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "avg_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

## We convert the multiple times series data to appropriate dataframe for stack area plot
```{r}

selected_list <-all_sta_list$Myl
stacked_avg_list <- list()

for (m in 1:length(selected_list)) {
  
  df <- selected_list[[m]]
  
  selected_data <- grep(paste(c("roi"),collapse="|"),  colnames(df))
  
  df  <- df [, selected_data] %>%  as.data.frame()
  df$Time<- 1:nrow(df)
  
  stacked_avg_list [[m]] <- df %>% pivot_longer(cols=c(1:ncol(df)-1), names_to="roi", values_to="int")
  
}

names( stacked_avg_list )<- names(selected_list)
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
stacked_avg_list$`210119.PARac1mVenus_LASiR_Myl12amScar.01.tif` %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = Time, y = int, fill = roi)) +
    geom_area(alpha=1 , size=.25, colour="white") +
  
  scale_y_continuous( expand = c(0, 0),  
                      limits = c(-5, 5), 
                      breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), 
                     limits=c(25,144), 
                     breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) + 
  
  scale_fill_viridis(discrete = T) + # scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  
  geom_vline(xintercept=c(25,49,73,97,121), linetype="dashed", color = "black")+

  #geom_vline(xintercept=c(145,181,205,241,265,300 ), linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
  
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```
```{r}
ggsave(
  "sta_stack.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

# Here we separate the outrgwoth and retraction events first, sum the changes of all neurites, and then do smoothening. (separate -> sum -> smoothening)
```{r}
all_sta_PN_list <- list()

for (k in 1:length(all_sta_list)){
  
  selected_list <- all_sta_list[[k]]
  sta_PN_list <- list()
  
  thres= 0.0 # change threshold here
  
  for (m in 1:length(selected_list)) {
    
    DT <- selected_list[[m]] %>% as.data.frame()
   
    DT_pos<- DT
    DT_neg<- DT
  
    for (n in 1:dim(DT)[2]){
        DT_pos[, n][DT_pos[, n] < 0] <- 0 
        DT_neg[, n][DT_neg[, n] > 0] <- 0 
    }
    
    mat_sum <- data.frame(rowSums(DT_pos), -rowSums(DT_neg)) # add neg sign
    
   # mat_sum [, 1][mat_sum [, 1] < thres] <- 0 
   # mat_sum [, 2][mat_sum [, 2] > -thres] <- 0
    
    mat_sum <- mat_sum %>% forecast::ma(3)                    # smoothing #2
  
    colnames(mat_sum)<- c(paste("Pos_", names(all_list)[k], sep = ""), paste("Neg_", names(all_list)[k], sep = ""))
    sta_PN_list[[m]] <- mat_sum
  
  }
  
  names(sta_PN_list)<-  names(selected_list)
  
  all_sta_PN_list[[k]]<- sta_PN_list
  
}

names(all_sta_PN_list)<- names(all_list )
```

# Combine all stationary PN data of each videos, and add stationary soma data
```{r}
comb_sta_list<- list()

k <- all_sta_PN_list[[1]]%>% length()

for (m in 1:k){
  
  mat <- all_sta_PN_list[[1]][m] %>% as.data.frame()
  colnames(mat)<- sub('.*\\.', '', colnames(mat))
  
  for (n in 2:length(all_sta_PN_list)){
    
    mat2 <- all_sta_PN_list[[n]][m] %>% as.data.table()
    colnames(mat2)<- sub('.*\\.', '', colnames(mat2))
    
    mat <- data.frame(mat, mat2)
  }
  
  Dim <- mat %>% nrow()
  NM <- all_sta_PN_list[[1]][m] %>% names()
  mat3 <- mts_stationary_list[[NM]][1:Dim, c(2:4)] %>% as.data.table() # soma data
  mat <- data.frame(mat, mat3)
  
 comb_sta_list[[m]]<- mat %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 

}

names(comb_sta_list)<-   all_sta_PN_list[[1]] %>% names()
```

## Plotting the time series as curves
```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}

selected_list <- comb_sta_list
plot_list.1 <- list()

for (n in 1:length(selected_list ))  {

ts <- selected_list[[n]]
 
fig_A <- ts[, c(1,2)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                     ggtitle (names(all_sta_PN_list)[1]) +
                                      geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
 
fig_B <- ts[, c(3,4)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle (names(all_sta_PN_list)[2]) +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_C <-ts[, c(5,6)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle (names(all_sta_PN_list)[3]) +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_D <- ts[, c(7,8)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle (names(all_sta_PN_list)[4]) +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_E <- ts[, c(9,10)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle (names(all_sta_PN_list)[5]) +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_F <- ts[, c(11,12)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle (names(all_sta_PN_list)[6]) +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_G <- ts[, c(13,14)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle (names(all_sta_PN_list)[7]) +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_H <- ts[, c(15)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle ("soma_actin") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_I <- ts[, c(16)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle ("soma_Arp3") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

plot_list.1[[n]]<- ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A,fig_B,fig_C,fig_D,fig_E,fig_F,fig_G,fig_H,fig_I,
                  labels = LETTERS[1:9],
                  ncol = 3, nrow = 3,  legend="none")

}

names(plot_list.1)<- names(comb_sta_list)

```

## Visualization of the selected curves
```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
plot_list.1$Arp3SNAPSiR_07_02_R3D_D3D_subbg.tif

```
# cross-correlation of stationary PN data

```{r warning=FALSE}
selected_list <- comb_sta_list#[ grepl("Arp3SNAPSiR_07", names(comb_sta_list)) ]
ccf_PN_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = length(all_list)+length(soma_intenity_list))

names(ccf_PN_list)<- c(names(all_list), paste("soma_", names(soma_intenity_list), sep = ""))

for (n in 1:10){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,(n*2-1)],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,(n*2)], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,(n*2-1)],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,(n*2)], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_PN_list[[n]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
# cross-correlation with stationary Pos_length data

ccf_Poslen_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = ncol(selected_list[[1]])-2)

df <- selected_list[[1]] %>% as.data.table()

names(ccf_Poslen_list)<- colnames(df[, -c("Pos_length","Neg_length")] )

for (n in 3:length(df)){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,c("Pos_length")],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,c("Pos_length")],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_Poslen_list[[n-2]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
# cross-correlation with stationary Neg_length data

ccf_Neglen_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = ncol(selected_list[[1]])-2)

df <- selected_list[[1]] %>% as.data.table()

names(ccf_Neglen_list)<- colnames(df[, -c("Pos_length","Neg_length")] )

for (n in 3:length(df)){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,c("Neg_length")],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,c("Neg_length")],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<-  names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_Neglen_list[[n-2]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
# cross-correlation of Arp3-Myl data
selected_list <- comb_sta_list

ccf_Arp3Myl_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = 7)

names(ccf_Arp3Myl_list)<- c(paste("Pos_", c("tip", "neurite", "Density"), sep=""), paste("Neg_", c("tip", "neurite", "Density"), sep=""), "soma")

for (n in 1:7){
  
  pair_df<- selected_list[[1]][,grep(names(ccf_Arp3Myl_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[1]]))] 
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (pair_df[ ,2],  
                      pair_df[ ,3], 
                      type = "correlation", 
                      na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                      lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
    
     pair_df2<- selected_list[[m]][,grep(names(ccf_Arp3Myl_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[m]]))] 
  
      ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (pair_df2[ ,2],  
                          pair_df2[ ,3], 
                          type = "correlation", 
                          na.action = na.pass,
                        plot=F, 
                          lag.max=100) 
      
      ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
      
      ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<-  names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_Arp3Myl_list[[n]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
# cross-correlation with soma actin

ccf_Actsoma_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = 8)

names(ccf_Actsoma_list)<- c(paste("Pos_", c("length", "tip_actin", "neurite_actin", "Density_actin"), sep=""), paste("Neg_", c("length","tip_actin", "neurite_actin", "Density_actin"), sep=""))

for (n in 1:8){
  
  df1 <- selected_list[[1]][ ,"soma_Actin"]
  df2 <- selected_list[[1]][,grep(names(ccf_Actsoma_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[n]]))] 
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (df1,  
                      df2, 
                      type = "correlation", 
                      na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                      lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
     df1 <- selected_list[[m]][ ,"soma_Actin"]
     df2 <- selected_list[[m]][,grep(names(ccf_Actsoma_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[n]]))]  
  
      ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (df1,  
                          df2, 
                          type = "correlation", 
                          na.action = na.pass,
                         plot=F, 
                          lag.max=100) 
      
      ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
      
      ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_Actsoma_list[[n]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
# cross-correlation with soma Arp3

ccf_Arp3soma_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = 8)

names(ccf_Arp3soma_list)<- c(paste("Pos_", c("length", "tip_Arp3", "neurite_Arp3", "Density_Arp3"), sep=""), paste("Neg_", c("length","tip_Arp3", "neurite_Arp3", "Density_Arp3"), sep=""))

for (n in 1:length(ccf_Arp3soma_list)){
  
  df1 <- selected_list[[1]][ ,"soma_Arp3"]
  df2 <- selected_list[[1]][,grep(names(ccf_Arp3soma_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[n]]))] 
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (df1,  
                      df2, 
                      type = "correlation", 
                      na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                      lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
     df1 <- selected_list[[m]][ ,"soma_Arp3"]
     df2 <- selected_list[[m]][,grep(names(ccf_Arp3soma_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[n]]))]  
  
      ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (df1,  
                          df2, 
                          type = "correlation", 
                          na.action = na.pass,
                        plot=F, 
                          lag.max=100) 
      
      ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
      
      ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_Arp3soma_list[[n]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
ccf_all_list<-list(PN=ccf_PN_list, Poslen=ccf_Poslen_list, Neglen=ccf_Neglen_list, Arp3Myl=ccf_Arp3Myl_list, somaActin=ccf_Actsoma_list, somaArp3=ccf_Arp3soma_list)

```

```{r}
selected_ccf <- ccf_all_list$Arp3Myl$soma

selected_ccf$lag <- selected_ccf$lag/freq

stacked_ccf_mat <- selected_ccf %>% gather(Cell, ccf, -lag) # select which CCF of measurements to show

df_summary <- data.frame(Time=selected_ccf$lag, 
                         n=tapply(stacked_ccf_mat$ccf, stacked_ccf_mat$lag, length), 
                         mean=tapply(stacked_ccf_mat$ccf, stacked_ccf_mat$lag, mean, na.rm=TRUE))

df_summary$sd <- tapply(stacked_ccf_mat$ccf, stacked_ccf_mat$lag, sd, na.rm=TRUE)
df_summary$sem <- df_summary$sd/sqrt(df_summary$n-1)
```

```{r}
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="lightgrey")+
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=1) +
  
   stat_peaks(colour = "red", span = 11, ignore_threshold = 0.5) +
  stat_peaks(geom = "text", colour = "red", span = 11, ignore_threshold = 0.6, hjust = 2, angle = 0) +
  stat_valleys(colour = "lightblue", span = 13, ignore_threshold = 0.9) +
 stat_valleys(geom = "text", colour = "blue", span = 13, ignore_threshold = 0.9, hjust = -0.5, angle = 0) +
  
   theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
   geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
   scale_y_continuous( breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6))+
   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8), limits = c(-400,400)) +theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
fig_A <- stacked_ccf_mat %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=lag, y=ccf)) + geom_point(alpha=0.3, size=0.5) +
   geom_line(aes(color=Cell), size=0.8)+ theme(legend.position = "none") 

fig_B <-stacked_ccf_mat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = ccf, fill=Cell)) +
    geom_area(alpha=1 , size=.05, colour="white") +
    #scale_fill_viridis(discrete = T) +  
  #scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
   geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
   scale_y_continuous( breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-500, 500), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) + 
  theme_linedraw()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_C <-ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=0.8) +
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="blue", alpha=0.2)

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A,fig_B,fig_C,
                  labels = LETTERS[1:3],
                  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,  legend="none")

```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "avg_2.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r, message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=5}
library("plotly")
sp <- ggplotly(fig_A, dynamicTicks = "y")
style(sp, hoveron = "points", hoverinfo = "x+y+text", hoverlabel = list(bgcolor = "white"))
```

# Create time-series data of total neurite length, Arp3 and actin intensity/density at neurite tip, shaft, and soma. 
```{r}

mts_list<- list()
mts_avg_list <- list()
mts_stationary_list <- list()

freq <- 0.1 # set frequency (1/interval)
pixel <- 0.1296 # set pixel size

for (n in 1:length(length_list))  {
 
  mat <- length_list[[n]] %>% rowSums() %>% as.data.table() # total neurite length
  colnames(mat) <- "sum_length"
  
  # get soma intensity
  ColName <- gsub("Kymo_", "", names(Tip_Arp3_list)[n])

  Dim <- nrow(Tip_Arp3_list[[n]])
  mat$soma_Actin <- soma_intenity_list$Actin[1:Dim, grepl(ColName , names(soma_intenity_list$Actin)) ] 
  mat$soma_Arp3 <- soma_intenity_list$Arp3[1:Dim, grepl(ColName , names(soma_intenity_list$Arp3)) ] 
  mat$soma_Myl <- soma_intenity_list$Myl[1:Dim, grepl(ColName , names(soma_intenity_list$Myl)) ] 
  
  mat$sum_tip_actin <- Tip_Actin_list[[n]] %>% rowSums()
  mat$sum_tip_Arp3 <- Tip_Arp3_list[[n]] %>% rowSums() 
  mat$sum_tip_Myl <- Tip_Myl_list[[n]] %>% rowSums() 
  
  mat$sum_neurite_actin <-  Neurite_Actin_list[[n]] %>% rowSums()
  mat$sum_neurite_Arp3 <-  Neurite_Arp3_list[[n]] %>% rowSums()
  mat$sum_neurite_Myl <-  Neurite_Myl_list[[n]] %>% rowSums()
  
  mat$sum_actin <- (Neurite_Actin_list[[n]]+ Tip_Actin_list[[n]]) %>% rowSums() # total actin intensity at the whole neurite
  mat$sum_Arp3 <- (Neurite_Arp3_list[[n]]+ Tip_Arp3_list[[n]]) %>% rowSums()  # total Arp3 intensity at the whole neurite
  mat$sum_Myl <- (Neurite_Myl_list[[n]]+ Tip_Myl_list[[n]]) %>% rowSums()  # total Arp3 intensity at the whole neurite
  
  mat$sum_actin_density <- mat$sum_actin/mat$sum_length # actin density at the whole neurite
  mat$sum_Arp3_density <- mat$sum_Arp3/mat$sum_length # Arp3 density at the whole neurite
  mat$sum_Myl_density <- mat$sum_Myl/mat$sum_length # Arp3 density at the whole neurite

  mts_list[[n]]<- mat %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
  
  mts_avg_list[[n]] <- mts_list[[n]] %>% forecast::ma(2) %>% as.ts() # Moving Average #1
  colnames(mts_avg_list[[n]])<-colnames(mts_list[[n]])
  
  mts_stationary_list[[n]] <- mts_avg_list[[n]] %>% 
    MTS::diffM(d=1) %>% 
    forecast::ma(2) %>%                                             # Moving Average #2
    ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
  
  colnames(mts_stationary_list[[n]])<-colnames(mts_list[[n]])
  
}

names(mts_list)<- gsub("Kymo_", "", names(Tip_Arp3_list))
names(mts_avg_list)<- gsub("Kymo_", "", names(Tip_Arp3_list))
names(mts_stationary_list)<- gsub("Kymo_", "", names(Tip_Arp3_list))
```

## Plotting the time series as curves
```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE}

selected_list <- mts_stationary_list
plot_list.2 <- list()

for (n in 1:length(selected_list ))  {
  
selected_list[[n]] %>% colnames()
 
fig_A <- selected_list[[n]][, 1] %>%  autoplot() +
                                     ggtitle ("Neurite length") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
 
fig_B <- selected_list[[n]][, c(2, 3)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle ("Soma") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_C <- selected_list[[n]][, c(4,5)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle ("Neurite tip") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_D <- selected_list[[n]][, c(6,7)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle ("Neurite shaft") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_E <- selected_list[[n]][, c(8,9)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle ("Whole neurite") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

fig_F <- selected_list[[n]][, c(10,11)] %>%  autoplot() +
                                      ggtitle ("Density at neurite") +
                                        geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
                                      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                            plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
                                            panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
                                            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                                            axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text

plot_list.2[[n]]<- ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A, fig_B, fig_C, fig_D, fig_E, fig_F,
                  labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),
                  ncol = 3, nrow = 2,  legend="none")

}

names(plot_list.2)<- gsub("Arp3_", "", names(Tip_Arp3_list))

```

## Visualization of the selected curves
```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
plot_list.2$Arp3SNAPSiR_07_02_R3D_D3D_subbg.tif
```

# cross-correlation with sum neurite length
```{r warning=FALSE}

selected_list <- mts_stationary_list

ccf_sum_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = ncol(selected_list[[1]])-1)

names(ccf_sum_list)<- colnames(selected_list[[1]])[-1]

for (n in 2:ncol(selected_list[[1]])){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,1],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                    plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,1],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                     plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)[-1]<- gsub("Kymo_", "", names(Tip_Arp3_list))
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_sum_list[[n-1]] <- ccf
}

```

# cross-correlation of actin-Arp3 data
```{r warning=FALSE}

selected_list <-mts_stationary_list#[ grepl("Arp3SNAPSiR_07", names(mts_stationary_list)) ]

ccf_sumActArp3_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = 4)

names(ccf_sumActArp3_list)<- c("soma", "sum_tip", "sum_neurite", "density")

for (n in 1:4){
  
  pair_df<- selected_list[[1]][,grep(names(ccf_sumActArp3_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[1]]))] 
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (pair_df[ ,1],  
                      pair_df[ ,2], 
                      type = "correlation", 
                      na.action = na.pass,
                     plot=F, 
                      lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
    
     pair_df2<- selected_list[[m]][,grep(names(ccf_sumActArp3_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[m]]))] 
  
      ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (pair_df2[ ,1],  
                          pair_df2[ ,2], 
                          type = "correlation", 
                          na.action = na.pass,
                         plot=F, 
                          lag.max=100) 
      
      ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
      
      ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)[-1]<-  names(comb_sta_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_sumActArp3_list[[n]] <- ccf
}

```

# cross-correlation with soma actin
```{r warning=FALSE}

selected_list <-mts_stationary_list#[ grepl("Arp3SNAPSiR_07", names(mts_stationary_list)) ]

ccf_sumActsoma_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = ncol(selected_list[[1]]))

names(ccf_sumActsoma_list)<- colnames(selected_list[[1]])

for (n in 1:length(ccf_sumActsoma_list)){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,2],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                     plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,2],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                     plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)[-1]<- names(comb_sta_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_sumActsoma_list[[n]] <- ccf
}

```

# cross-correlation with soma Arp3
```{r warning=FALSE}

selected_list <- mts_stationary_list#[ grepl("Arp3SNAPSiR_07", names(mts_stationary_list)) ]

ccf_sumArp3soma_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = ncol(selected_list[[1]]))

names(ccf_sumArp3soma_list)<- colnames(selected_list[[1]])

for (n in 1:length(ccf_sumArp3soma_list)){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,3],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                     plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,3],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                     plot=F, 
                            lag.max=100) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)[-1]<- names(comb_sta_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-100:100)
  ccf_sumArp3soma_list[[n]] <- ccf
}

```

```{r}
ccf_sum_all_list<-list(sumlength=ccf_sum_list, ActArp3= ccf_sumActArp3_list, somaActin=ccf_sumActsoma_list, somaArp3=ccf_sumArp3soma_list)

```

```{r}
selected_ccf <- ccf_sum_all_list$somaArp3$soma_Myl
selected_ccf$lag <- selected_ccf$lag*(1/freq)
stacked_ccf_mat <- selected_ccf %>% gather(Cell, ccf, -lag) # select which CCF of measurements to show

df_summary <- data.frame(Time=selected_ccf$lag, 
                         n=tapply(stacked_ccf_mat$ccf, stacked_ccf_mat$lag, length), 
                         mean=tapply(stacked_ccf_mat$ccf, stacked_ccf_mat$lag, mean, na.rm=TRUE))

df_summary$sd <- tapply(stacked_ccf_mat$ccf, stacked_ccf_mat$lag, sd, na.rm=TRUE)
df_summary$sem <- df_summary$sd/sqrt(df_summary$n-1)
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +

   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="lightgrey", alpha=1)+
     geom_line(size=1, alpha=0.8) +
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
   geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  
   stat_peaks(colour = "red", ignore_threshold = 0.9) +
 stat_peaks(geom = "text", colour = "red", vjust = -0.5, ignore_threshold = 0.9) +
  stat_valleys(colour = "blue", ignore_threshold = 0.9)+
 stat_valleys(geom = "text", colour = "blue", angle = 45, vjust = 1.5, hjust = 1, ignore_threshold = 0.9)+
  
   scale_y_continuous( breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 7))+
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-400, 400), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8)) + 
  theme_linedraw()+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
fig_A <- stacked_ccf_mat %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=lag, y=ccf)) + geom_point(alpha=0.3, size=0.5) +
   geom_line(aes(color=Cell), size=0.8)+ theme(legend.position = "none") 

fig_B <-stacked_ccf_mat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = ccf, fill=Cell)) +
    geom_area(alpha=0.5 , size=.5, colour="grey") +
    scale_fill_viridis(discrete = T) +  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ theme(legend.position = "none") 

fig_C <-ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=0.8) +
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="blue", alpha=0.2)

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A,fig_B,fig_C,
                  labels = LETTERS[1:3],
                  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,  legend="none")

```

# Time-lagged cross-corrleation of outgrowth and retraction profiles
```{r warning=FALSE}
# constructing partial dependence (i.e., marginal effect) plots 
library(pdp)
theme_set(theme_bw())
mts_avg_list[[2]][ ,c("Length.2", "Length.4")] %>%  autoplot() +
  ylim(0, 45) +
  ggtitle (plot_title) +
  geom_line(aes(),size=1)  +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)

```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
